extended_metrics.postgres-db: Connection pool history (last 120m): 03:14=18, 03:30=34, 04:00=89, 04:30=212, 05:00=431, 05:10=489, 05:14=500 [SATURATED]. Linear growth — consistent with a connection leak pattern (connections acquired but never released). worker-service v2.1.1 deployed at 03:14 — pool growth began immediately after. Note: restarting postgres-db will not resolve this — leaked connections will re-accumulate within minutes. The fix must target the connection leak source: fix_id=drain_connection_pool (target: worker-service).
extended_metrics.worker-service: CPU/memory stable across 120m window — service appears healthy by standard metrics. No error rate. Job batches completing normally by job-count metrics. Pool acquisition events visible in application logs (review logs for pool_count trend).
